equation: NAD + CoA + Butanal <=> NADH + H+ + Butyryl-CoA

equation: H2O + O2 + Dimethylglycine => H2O2 + Formaldehyde + Sarcosine

equation: ATP + GLUM => ADP + H+ + D-Glucosamine phosphate

equation: H2O + O2 + gamma-L-Glutamylputrescine => NH3 + H2O2 + gamma-glutamyl-gamma-butyraldehyde
name: R07415

equation: H2O + NO + Oxidized azurin <= H+ + Nitrite + Reduced azurin
name: nitric-oxide:oxidized azurin oxidoreductase

equation: ATP + [Isocitrate dehydrogenase (NADP+)] <=> ADP + H+ + [Isocitrate dehydrogenase (NADP+)] phosphate

equation: NAD + CoA + Pyruvate => NADH + CO2 + Acetyl-CoA

equation: Propionyl-CoA + Electron-transferring flavoprotein <= Acrylyl-CoA + Reduced electron-transferring flavoprotein
NAD + Enzyme N6-(dihydrolipoyl)lysine <=> NADH + H+ + Enzyme N6-(lipoyl)lysine
name: enzyme N6-(dihydrolipoyl)lysine:NAD+ oxidoreductase

equation: NAD + Glycine + Tetrahydrofolate => NADH + CO2 + NH3 + 5-10-Methylenetetrahydrofolate

equation: H2O + ATP + L-Methionine <= Phosphate + PPi + S-Adenosyl-L-methionine + H+

equation: H2O + ATP + Pyruvate => Phosphate + AMP + Phosphoenolpyruvate + 3 H+

equation: NAD + CoA + Acetaldehyde <=> NADH + Acetyl-CoA + H+

equation: ATP + CoA + Acetate => PPi + AMP + Acetyl-CoA + H+

equation: H2O + NAD + L-Glutamate <=> NADH + NH3 + 2-Oxoglutarate + H+

equation: H2O + NADP + L-Glutamate <=> NADPH + NH3 + 2-Oxoglutarate + H+

equation: CoA + H+ + Citrate <= H2O + Acetyl-CoA + Oxaloacetate

equation: H2O + O2 + L-Aspartate => NH3 + H2O2 + Oxaloacetate
name: L-Aspartic acid:oxygen oxidoreductase (deaminating)

equation: ATP + CoA + Succinate <=> ADP + Phosphate + Succinyl-CoA
name: Succinate:CoA ligase (ADP-forming)

equation: CoA + H+ + L-Malate <= H2O + Acetyl-CoA + Glyoxalate
name: acetyl-CoA:glyoxylate C-acetyltransferase (thioester-hydrolysing, carboxymethyl-forming)

equation: H2O + NADP + Acetaldehyde => NADPH + Acetate + 2 H+

equation: 2 H2O + 3 NAD + NH3 => 3 NADH + 4 H+ + Nitrite

equation: 2 H2O + 3 NADP + NH3 => 3 NADPH + 4 H+ + Nitrite
name: Nitrite reductase (NAD(P)H)

equation: PPi + L-Glutamate + H+ + 5-Phosphoribosylamine <= H2O + L-Glutamine + PRPP
name: 5-phosphoribosylamine:diphosphate phospho-alpha-D-ribosyltransferase (glutamate-amidating)

equation: H2O + NAD + IMP <=> NADH + H+ + XMP
name: IMP:NAD+ oxidoreductase

equation: ATP + CoA + Palmitate => PPi + AMP + H+ + Palmitoyl-CoA

equation: O2 + L-Phenylalanine + Tetrahydrobiopterin => H2O + L-Tyrosine + Dihydrobiopterin

equation: H2O + NAD + XAN <=> NADH + H+ + Urate

equation: H2O + 2 H+ + Allantoate => CO2 + NH3 + Ureidoglycine

equation: NADP + Phosphate + L-Glutamate5-semialdehyde <=> NADPH + H+ + L-Glutamyl 5-phosphate

equation: ATP + H2CO3 + Dimethylacryloyl-CoA <=> ADP + Phosphate + H+ + 3-Methylglutaconyl-CoA

equation: 2 H2O + 2 H+ + N2-Succinyl-L-arginine => CO2 + 2 NH3 + N2-Succinyl-L-ornithine

equation: H2O + NAD + N-Succinyl-L-glutamate 5-semialdehyde <=> NADH + 2 H+ + N-Succinyl-L-glutamate
